revision.comment: wtf it's not being deleted it's merge, anyways done
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{ Fix | link = WP:NOTPROMOTION | text = promotion? | title = Material appears to be promotional in nature. | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles with a promotional tone | date = {{{date|}}} }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All articles with a promotional tone]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{ Fix | link = WP:NOTPROMOTION | text = promotion? | title = Material appears to be promotional in nature. | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles with a promotional tone | date = {{{date|}}} }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All articles with a promotional tone]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
